summary: Tested new Guided Paths feature. All APIs and UI components working correctly. Farewell page: 4 path cards load from API, 4 service category cards have 'Talk to Concierge' buttons that open modal, product modal Add to Cart works. Adopt page: 4 adoption journey paths load from API with expandable step details.
critical_code_review_comments: guided_paths_routes.py: Clean CRUD API with proper MongoDB integration, upsert logic in seed function prevents duplicates
FarewellPage.jsx (lines 300-336): Correctly fetches paths from API with icon mapping, handles loading state
AdoptPage.jsx (lines 348-383): Same pattern for adopt paths, properly mapped icons
Both pages have proper data-testid attributes for all path cards (farewell-path-*, adoption-path-*)
seed_data_creation: Guided paths seeded via Master Sync (20 total: 8 emergency, 4 advisory, 4 farewell, 4 adopt)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Guided Paths API and UI fully tested. API endpoints: GET /api/guided-paths/{pillar} for farewell/adopt/emergency/advisory. FarewellPage has 'Talk to Concierge' buttons on service category cards that open modal. Product modal Add to Cart working.

verification_results.api_farewell_paths: PASS - 4 paths returned with steps, correct pillar, ordered
verification_results.api_adopt_paths: PASS - 4 paths returned (adopt-before, adopt-first-7-days, adopt-first-3-weeks, adopt-first-3-months)
verification_results.farewell_page_paths_section: PASS - 4 path cards with data-testid='farewell-path-*' loaded from API
verification_results.farewell_service_categories: PASS - 4 cards (hospice, cremation, memorial, support) each with 'Talk to Concierge' button
verification_results.farewell_concierge_modal: PASS - Modal opens when clicking 'Talk to Concierge' with service form
verification_results.farewell_product_modal: PASS - Product modal opens with Add to Cart button (data-testid='modal-add-to-cart-btn')
verification_results.adopt_page_paths_section: PASS - 4 adoption path cards with data-testid='adoption-path-*' loaded from API
verification_results.adopt_path_expansion: PASS - Clicking path card shows steps with badges and action buttons
